nodes.name: Daily Schedule
nodes.comment: Triggers the flow once a day at 8 AM UTC to check for new Product Hunt launches.

nodes.name: Get Last Timestamp
nodes.comment: Reads the last processed timestamp from Google Sheets (assume column A has key 'last_timestamp', column B has the ISO date value). Replace documentId with your actual Google Sheet ID.

nodes.name: Set Since Date
nodes.comment: Sets the 'since_date' to the last timestamp or defaults to 24 hours ago if none exists.

nodes.name: Fetch PH Launches
nodes.comment: Fetches the latest 100 featured launches from Product Hunt GraphQL API. Set up headerAuth credential with 'Authorization' header and 'Bearer your_token' value.

nodes.name: Check Fetch Success
nodes.comment: Checks if the API fetch was successful (posts data exists). True proceeds to processing; false goes to error handler.

nodes.name: Filter New Launches
nodes.comment: Filters the fetched launches to include only those with featuredAt > since_date (determines new launches, filtering out already processed).

nodes.name: Check for New Launches
nodes.comment: Determines if there are any new launches to process. True proceeds to processing; false ends the flow.

nodes.name: Process Launches
nodes.comment: Processes new launches: flattens data into one item per maker-post pair, preparing for personalized email sending.

parameters.subject: Congrats on your Product Hunt Launch!
parameters.text:
={{ "Hi " + $json.maker.name + ",

Congratulations on launching " + $json.post.name + " on Product Hunt! We'd love to discuss potential collaboration.

Best,
Your Name" }}

nodes.name: Send Outreach Email
nodes.comment: Sends personalized outreach email to each maker. Note: Product Hunt API does not provide emails; this uses a placeholder (username@example.com). Replace with actual email logic (e.g., via email finder tool or scraping) in a prior Code node.

nodes.name: Calculate Max Timestamp
nodes.comment: Calculates the maximum featuredAt timestamp from processed launches for updating storage.

nodes.name: Update Last Timestamp
nodes.comment: Updates the last processed timestamp in Google Sheets for the next run. Matches key 'last_timestamp' in column A and updates column B.

string.name: error_message
string.value: Failed to fetch Product Hunt data.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.comment: Error handling node: Sets an error message. Extend this to send notifications (e.g., connect to another Email node).

nodes.name: No New Launches
nodes.comment: No-op node for the end of the flow when there are no new launches.
